---
title: "Caroline Harriet Abraham"
---

## Caroline Harriet Abraham

**Dates:** (1809/10-1877)

**Maiden name:** (Palmer)

### Description

missionary to New Zealand

### Biography

Daughter of Sir Charles Thomas Palmer, 2nd Bt., she married (17 January 1850) the Rt. Rev. Charles John Abraham (1814-1903).  She and Sarah Harriet (Richardson) Selwyn were first cousins. Her sister Mary Anne Palmer was living in 1871 near Mary Anne Dyson at Ewshott in Hants.

### Letters

- Letter from November 4, 1867
- Letter from July 7, 1861
- Letter from March 28th [1857]
- Letter from March 22d [1855]
- Letter from June 9, 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
